violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. - Several cartons of smoothy mix (under espresso machine) not discarded by "Best By" date. Strawberry's date 8/8/2025, Strawberry Banana 6/14/2025. If kept in freezer until ready for use, needs to have date when taken out of freezer then discarded after 10 days.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Bottoms of pretable, refrigerators, & reach-in freezer accumulating food crumbs and in need of cleaning.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Fans in walk-in cooler in need of cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. - Spray bottle with blue liquid not labeled. Chemical/liquid needs to be identified. Writing on bottle with a sharpie is fine.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
